scripts.build: npm run data:check && npm run build:eden && npm run build:tailwind && node scripts/update-build-metadata.mjs && vite build && node scripts/post-build.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint js/loyalty-calculator.js js/combos-db.js js/app-generator.js js/app-strife.js js/strife-db.js js/ocr-engine.js js/ocr-render.js js/ocr-time-filter.js js/counter-db.js scripts/roc-combo-importer.mjs scripts/firebase-set-admin-claim.mjs tests/unit/*.mjs
scripts.format: prettier --write .github/**/*.yml .eslintrc.json .prettierrc.json package.json js/ocr-render.js js/ocr-time-filter.js scripts/roc-combo-importer.mjs scripts/firebase-set-admin-claim.mjs tests/unit/**/*.mjs
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .github/**/*.yml .eslintrc.json .prettierrc.json package.json js/ocr-render.js js/ocr-time-filter.js scripts/roc-combo-importer.mjs scripts/firebase-set-admin-claim.mjs tests/unit/**/*.mjs
scripts.check:fast: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:unit && npm run i18n:check
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:unit && npm run i18n:check && npm run build && npm run size:check && npm run smoke
